response.justification: Over a decade of full-stack experience spanning TypeScript/Node.js, React, and MongoDB directly matches the role's primary stack, with current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling aligning precisely with the listed AI agent development requirement. Demonstrated multi-language proficiency, microservices at scale, and a strong testing/TDD background round out a well-calibrated senior IC profile.
strengths: Direct match on TypeScript/Node.js/React stack with current AI-agent and MCP tooling work
15+ years across web, mobile, embedded with proven TDD and testing discipline
Multi-language proficiency (TS, Java, DLang, C/C++) and microservices-at-scale experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest mentioned in resume
Cloud experience leans AWS/CDK; no explicit Kubernetes production ownership detailed
Polyglot breadth could signal less depth in any one current stack
